rule: syslog_code = "ROUTING-LDP-5-NBR_CHANGE" and raw does not contain "Up"

reason: theshold set for BGP maximum-prefixes is nearing the maximum
theshold set for BGP maximum-prefixes has been exceeded
The chassis inside temperature exceeds the max temperature threshold
BGP neighbor topology was removed from a session

rule: syslog_code = "ROUTING-OSPF-5-ADJCHG" and raw does not contain "to FULL"
syslog_code = "ROUTING-ISIS-5-ADJCHANGE" and raw does not contains "Up"

reason: SONET Alarm has been declared or released
T1E1 is operationally down due to alarm

rule: syslog_code = "PKT_INFRA-LINEPROTO-5-UPDOWN" and raw does not contains "changed state to Up"

syslog_code = "PKT_INFRA-LINK-3-UPDOWN" and raw does not contains "changed state to Up"

reason: Fan RPM is normal for all fans on indicated fan tray
Fan RPM is below operating level

rule: syslog_code = "ETHPORT-3-IF_SFP_ALARM" and raw contains "Cleared|cleared" and raw contains "High Rx"
reason: High RX Power Level on SFP Cleared

rule: syslog_code = "ETHPORT-3-IF_SFP_ALARM" and raw does not contain "Cleared&cleared" and raw contains "Low Tx"

rule: syslog_code = "ETHPORT-3-IF_SFP_ALARM" and raw contains "Cleared|cleared" and raw contains "Low Tx"

rule: syslog_code = "ETHPORT-3-IF_SFP_ALARM" and raw does not contain "Cleared&cleared" and raw contains "High Tx"

rule: syslog_code = "ETHPORT-3-IF_SFP_ALARM" and raw contains "Cleared|cleared" and raw contains "High Tx"
